# BrainBoxWorld

> BrainBoxWorld builds high-performance websites, AI systems, automation, and growth-focused digital experiences for ambitious brands.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of BrainBoxWorld services — web, AI, automation, and growth.
- [About](/about): Who we are and how we work.
- [Experience](/experience): Track record of SEO, traffic, and conversion results.
- [Portfolio](/portfolio): Selected client projects and live websites.
- [Case Studies](/case-studies): Detailed before/after results from client work.
- [Packages](/packages): Service tiers and pricing.
- [Blog](/blog): Strategic insights on SEO, conversion, and growth.
- [Audit](/audit): Request a free Growth Foundations Audit.
- [Contact](/contact): Get in touch to start a project.
